tasks.label: CKA: Artifact Integrity Check (Release Stamp)
args: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p artifacts/cka_references/v1_release; cp artifacts/cka_references/v1/probe_protocol.json artifacts/cka_references/v1_release/probe_protocol.json; /home/tim/venvs/llm/bin/python tools/cka_artifact_integrity.py --artifact-dir artifacts/cka_references/v1_release --scaffold-if-missing --version v1_release --code-version $(git rev-parse --short HEAD) --strict
